title: Eu (hangul)
summary: Eu (letter: ㅡ; name: 으) is one of the Korean hangul vowels, pronounced like the IPA sound [ɯ] (the close back unrounded vowel).
text:
Eu (letter: ㅡ; name: 으) is one of the Korean hangul vowels, pronounced like the IPA sound [ɯ] (the close back unrounded vowel).
